mainEntity.name: How to choose approved doctor for comp in Murray without employer bias?
mainEntity.text: How to choose approved doctor for comp in Murray without employer bias?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use Labor Commission list or any MD; request change if conflict after 3 visits[1][4].

suggestedAnswer.text: Murray: Avoid employer panels if biased. Independent MD strengthens claim. Document bias for hearing[1][4].
